The '''Five Veils Route''', also known as the '''Five Veils' Tour trade route''', was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] that ran from [[Farstine]] to its terminus at [[Skynara]] which was located in the [[Skine sector/Legends|Skine sector]].<ref name="GG9" /> It was the site of the [[Five Veils Campaign]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

{{Route-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim'' establishes that Farstine is the head of the Five Veils' Tour trade route, which linked Farstine to Skynara in the Skine sector. In [[2009]]'s ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], no mention was made of the Five Veils' Tour trade route, but a Five Veils Route was included, linking Farstine to Svivren in the Svivreni sector. In a thread on the [[Jedi Council Forums]] on [[TheForce.net|TheForce.Net]], Fry clarified that the Five Veils' Tour trade route and the Five Veils Route were the same hyperlane and that the differing destinations were a result of tourism and shipping companies setting different endpoints.<ref name="Fry">{{JCFCite|url=posts/50723299|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2013-05-16|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20150930074204/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-179}}</ref>
